description: Configure Microsoft Edge on a shared public computer for elderly and low-vision patrons to improve readability and accessibility. Set the default font size to 'Large' (at least 20px) and the minimum font size to 16px. Configure the browser to show the Home button on the toolbar, set the homepage to https://www.usa.gov, and ensure the browser opens this homepage on startup. Verify the configuration by visiting https://www.usa.gov and https://www.ssa.gov. Create a reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/accessibility_config_guide.txt listing the font size and homepage URL changes for other staff members.
